title: T-049 — Reference.AlertThresholds + d365_import_cache tables (NPD-e)
prompt:
# T-049 — AlertThresholds + d365_import_cache tables

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §11.3, §10.8, §11.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create two reference/cache tables that the dashboard depends on: Reference.AlertThresholds (per-tenant configurable RED/YELLOW day cutoffs + margin warn) and d365_import_cache (synced material codes + price status used by V04 + Refresh-D365 button).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0049_alert_thresholds_and_d365_cache.sql creates Reference.AlertThresholds(tenant_id, threshold_key TEXT PK-with-tenant, value_int, value_text, updated_at) + d365_import_cache(tenant_id, code TEXT PK-with-tenant, status TEXT CHECK in Found/NoCost/Missing, comment, last_synced_at).
2. Both tables ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY with tenant_isolation policies.
3. Drizzle schema entries in packages/db/src/schema/alert-thresholds.ts + packages/db/src/schema/d365-import-cache.ts; export typed Insert/Select; barrel update.
4. Indexes: AlertThresholds (tenant_id, threshold_key); d365_import_cache (tenant_id, status), (tenant_id, last_synced_at).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0049_alert_thresholds_and_d365_cache.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/alert-thresholds.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/d365-import-cache.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/alert-thresholds-and-d365-cache.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0049 runs, when \d Reference.AlertThresholds runs, then it lists threshold_key + value_int + value_text + tenant_id with composite PK (tenant_id, threshold_key) and RLS enabled per §11.3 last paragraph
2. Given d365_import_cache exists, when an INSERT with status='Invalid' is attempted, then it fails with CHECK constraint violation per §10.8 status enum (Found/NoCost/Missing only)
3. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM d365_import_cache runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/alert-thresholds-and-d365-cache.test.ts asserting RLS isolation + CHECK enforcement + indexes before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test alert-thresholds-and-d365-cache'

## Risk red lines
- Do not seed default threshold values here (separate seed task T-050)
- Do not allow status='Empty' as stored value (Empty is computed in V04, not stored)
- Do not skip RLS on either table

pipeline_inputs.description: Create Reference.AlertThresholds + d365_import_cache tables with RLS for dashboard alerts and V04 material validation.
